metadata.title: IT Club SMEAS - Innovate, Create, Inspire
metadata.description: Welcome to IT Club SMEAS - A community of tech enthusiasts, developers, and innovators. Join us to learn, build, and grow together.

hero.description: Join a community of passionate developers, designers, and tech enthusiasts. Build projects, learn new skills, and connect with industry professionals.

about.title: We Are IT Club - A Community of Tech Enthusiasts Dedicated to Learning, Building, and Growing Together
about.description: A student-led organization dedicated to fostering tech talent and innovation. We provide hands-on learning experiences through workshops, projects, and competitions.

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about IT Club

general.question: How can I join IT Club?
general.answer: You can join IT Club by filling out the registration form on our website or visiting our booth during club fair. We welcome students of all skill levels and backgrounds!

general.question: Do I need prior programming experience?
general.answer: Not at all! IT Club is open to everyone, from complete beginners to experienced developers. We offer beginner-friendly workshops and mentorship programs to help you get started.

general.question: What activities does IT Club organize?
general.answer: We organize coding workshops, hackathons, tech talks, study groups, project collaborations, industry visits, and networking events with professionals.

membership.question: How much time do I need to commit?
membership.answer: The time commitment is flexible. Most active members spend 3-5 hours per week. You can participate as much or as little as your schedule allows.

membership.question: Is there a membership fee?
membership.answer: Basic membership is completely free! Some special events may have a small fee to cover materials, but we strive to keep everything accessible.

membership.question: Can I join multiple divisions?
membership.answer: Absolutely! You're welcome to participate in multiple divisions. Many members explore different areas before specializing.

events.question: How do I register for workshops?
events.answer: Workshop registrations open through our website. Members get priority access and notifications. Simply click the register button on the event page!

events.question: Are events held online or offline?
events.answer: We offer both online and offline events. Regular workshops are at our campus lab, while some sessions are hybrid to accommodate remote participants.

events.question: Can I get a certificate for attending?
events.answer: Yes! We provide certificates for most workshops and events. Some advanced courses also offer completion certificates for your LinkedIn or portfolio.

projects.question: Can I propose my own project?
projects.answer: Absolutely! We encourage members to propose projects. You can pitch your idea to the leadership team, and we'll help you find team members and resources.

projects.question: What technologies do projects use?
projects.answer: Our projects use a variety of technologies including React, Next.js, Python, Node.js, Flutter, and more. You can choose technologies that match your interests.

projects.question: Can I add projects to my portfolio?
projects.answer: Yes! All projects you contribute to can be added to your portfolio. We also provide guidance on how to present your work professionally.

faq.contactText: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Please chat with our friendly team.
